S

save() - Method in class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigHandler
Saves the current configuration state to the file.
save() - Method in class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigManager
Saves all registered configuration files.
save(String...) - Method in class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigManager
Saves a specific configuration file.
saveDefaultConfig() - Method in class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigHandler
Saves the default configuration file if it does not already exist.
SubCommand - Interface in me.itzloghotxd.pdk.command
Represents a sub-command in the plugin.
